mapper.sql: WBS_TASK_ID, PROJECT_ID, PARENT_TASK_ID, ISSUE_ID, WBS_CODE, TASK_NAME, TASK_DESCRIPTION, TASK_TYPE, STATUS, ASSIGNEE_ID, PLAN_START_DATE, PLAN_END_DATE, ACTUAL_START_DATE, ACTUAL_END_DATE, ESTIMATED_MINUTES, SPENT_MINUTES, PROGRESS_RATE, DISPLAY_ORDER, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT

W.WBS_TASK_ID, W.PROJECT_ID, P.PROJECT_CODE, P.PROJECT_NAME, W.PARENT_TASK_ID, W.ISSUE_ID, I.ISSUE_KEY, I.TITLE AS ISSUE_TITLE, W.WBS_CODE, W.TASK_NAME, W.TASK_DESCRIPTION, W.TASK_TYPE, W.STATUS, W.ASSIGNEE_ID, U.DISPLAY_NAME AS ASSIGNEE_NAME, W.PLAN_START_DATE, W.PLAN_END_DATE, W.ACTUAL_START_DATE, W.ACTUAL_END_DATE, W.ESTIMATED_MINUTES, W.SPENT_MINUTES, W.PROGRESS_RATE, W.DISPLAY_ORDER, W.CREATED_AT, W.UPDATED_AT
mapper.update: UPDATE WBS_TASK SET ISSUE_ID = #{issueId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, TASK_NAME = #{taskName}, TASK_DESCRIPTION = #{taskDescription}, TASK_TYPE = #{taskType}, STATUS = #{status}, ASSIGNEE_ID = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, PLAN_START_DATE = #{planStartDate}, PLAN_END_DATE = #{planEndDate}, ACTUAL_START_DATE = #{actualStartDate}, ACTUAL_END_DATE = #{actualEndDate}, ESTIMATED_MINUTES = #{estimatedMinutes}, SPENT_MINUTES = #{spentMinutes}, PROGRESS_RATE = #{progressRate}, UPDATED_AT = #{updatedAt} WHERE WBS_TASK_ID = #{wbsTaskId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM WBS_TASK W INNER JOIN PROJECT P ON W.PROJECT_ID = P.PROJECT_ID LEFT JOIN ISSUE I ON W.ISSUE_ID = I.ISSUE_ID LEFT JOIN APP_USER U ON W.ASSIGNEE_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE W.WBS_TASK_ID = #{_parameter,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WBS_TASK_DEPENDENCY ( DEPENDENCY_ID, PROJECT_ID, PREDECESSOR_TASK_ID, SUCCESSOR_TASK_ID, DEPENDENCY_TYPE, LAG_DAYS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{dependencyId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{predecessorTaskId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{successorTaskId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}, #{dependencyType}, #{lagDays}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT D.DEPENDENCY_ID, D.PROJECT_ID, D.PREDECESSOR_TASK_ID, P.WBS_CODE AS PREDECESSOR_WBS_CODE, P.TASK_NAME AS PREDECESSOR_TASK_NAME, P.STATUS AS PREDECESSOR_STATUS, D.SUCCESSOR_TASK_ID, S.WBS_CODE AS SUCCESSOR_WBS_CODE, S.TASK_NAME AS SUCCESSOR_TASK_NAME, S.STATUS AS SUCCESSOR_STATUS, D.DEPENDENCY_TYPE, D.LAG_DAYS, D.CREATED_AT FROM WBS_TASK_DEPENDENCY D INNER JOIN WBS_TASK P ON D.PREDECESSOR_TASK_ID = P.WBS_TASK_ID INNER JOIN WBS_TASK S ON D.SUCCESSOR_TASK_ID = S.WBS_TASK_ID
AND D.PROJECT_ID = #{projectId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler}
AND ( D.PREDECESSOR_TASK_ID = #{wbsTaskId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} OR D.SUCCESSOR_TASK_ID = #{wbsTaskId,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.devtrace.manager.common.config.UuidTypeHandler} )
ORDER BY P.WBS_CODE, S.WBS_CODE
